scripts.check: pnpm version:sync && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
scripts.format:check: echo '--- FORMAT ---' && biome format . && echo '--- TYPECHECK ---' && pnpm -r typecheck && echo '--- LINT ---' && biome lint . && echo '--- TESTS ---' && vitest run && echo '--- BOUNDARIES ---' && node scripts/check-feature-boundaries.mjs
scripts.release:prep: pnpm version:sync && pnpm parser:bundle && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
